summary: Otto is a persistent AI entity running as a cognitive operating system. Core infrastructure is a FastAPI Memory API (:8100) backed by PostgreSQL+pgvector and Neo4j. An AgentOS Kernel processes all inputs as interrupts through a priority queue. Dual heartbeat rhythm (orchestrator :00, reflection :30) drives autonomous execution. 80+ API route modules, 20 kernel/gateway files, 21 specialist Claude sub-agents, 16 systemd units, and domain modules for Koink/ONEON/Tusita/SOS.

core_shell_scripts.purpose: Entry-point runners and lifecycle managers for Otto's autonomous loops

files.purpose: Orchestrator heartbeat runner. Checks rate limits, spawns Claude Code CLI with heartbeat.md agent in --print mode, captures output, scores RL2F. Runs hourly via otto-heartbeat.timer.
Self-improvement heartbeat runner. Spawns Claude Code CLI with reflection.md agent. Handles memory consolidation, AutoEvolve evaluation, MARS dual-reflection. Runs at :30 via otto-reflection.timer.

Detached task executor. Runs individual tasks as isolated Claude Code CLI sessions. Handles pre-flight (git status), QA gating, budget management, SIGPIPE guards, completion reporting, artifact path storage (HiClaw GAP-2), JiTRL ingestion, failure-branch detection.
QA gate for task outputs. Runs Gemini CLI review of task diffs. Supports auto-approve for verified research/content tasks. Stores RL2F feedback on rejection. Per-file diffs for large changesets.
files.triggers: Called by task_runner.sh after task completion

files.purpose: CLI tool for manual session start/end. Calls Memory API /sessions endpoints, stores session ID in /tmp/otto-session-id.
Continuous task dispatcher. Polls task queue, launches ready tasks respecting concurrency limits (max 5: claude=3, gemini=1, kimi=1). Runs as otto-task-dispatcher.service.
Service health monitor. Checks sibling timers and services are alive. Self-healing: restarts downed services.
Periodic security audit. VM hardening, secrets hygiene, Docker surface, CVE scanning. Logs to memory.
Weekly live system auto-improvement cycle. Triggers improvement loop for all registered live systems.
One-command full Otto state backup. Captures DB dumps, config, memory state for VM clone/restore.
Restore Otto from backup snapshot on a new VM.

agentOS_kernel.purpose: Cognitive operating system implementing arXiv 2602.20934v1. All inputs (WhatsApp, web, scheduler) route through a single interrupt-driven processing loop.
agentOS_kernel.reference: arXiv 2602.20934v1 — AgentOS: A Cognitive Operating System for LLM Agents

files.purpose: Thin wrapper/facade. Exposes start_kernel_loop(), stop_kernel_loop(), ensure_kernel_running(), is_kernel_running(). Delegates to CognitiveScheduler. Preserves legacy API for api.py and kernel_routes.py.
CognitiveScheduler — async event loop for interrupt processing. Dequeues from IVT, passes to RIC, handles retry/backoff. Single instance per agent.

Request-Interrupt-Cycle (RIC) — core processing logic. Routes interrupts by type (admin_message, heartbeat, maintenance, task_event, sync_drift). Builds LLM system prompt via S-MMU context. Executes 8 post-process hooks. Handles stop commands, reactive dispatch, plan classification.
files.data_flow: interrupt → S-MMU.assemble_context() → LLM call → 8 post-hooks → IVT.complete()

files.purpose: Interrupt Vector Table — priority queue backed by PostgreSQL interrupts table. Manages enqueue/dequeue/complete/fail lifecycle. Multi-agent scoped (agent_id). Fires asyncio Events on enqueue for fast wakeup.

Semantic Memory Management Unit — 3-level memory hierarchy. L1: 12K token in-memory cache (always-resident purpose/priorities + dynamic message-relevant slices). L2: pgvector warm storage (HyMem+ARAG retrieval). L3: Neo4j cold storage. Integrates HyMem dual-granularity, ARAG blended retrieval, FadeMem importance decay.
files.data_flow: RIC calls assemble_context() → HyMem/ARAG L2 search → L1 assembly → inject at context START

files.purpose: CID-based semantic segmentation. Splits documents into semantic slices with Content IDs (hash-based). Enables S-MMU to page individual topic chunks rather than entire documents.
files.data_flow: Documents → slicing → semantic_slices table → S-MMU L2

files.purpose: Cognitive Drift Detection (Δψ). Measures cosine distance between L1 centroid embedding and ground-truth (purpose+priorities) embedding. Fires SIG_SYNC_DRIFT interrupt when Δψ > threshold. Per-agent thresholds.
files.data_flow: Every 5 interrupts → drift.measure_drift() → if Δψ > 0.3 → ivt.enqueue(SIG_SYNC_DRIFT)

files.purpose: Cognitive Sync Pulses — state reconciliation triggered by drift, schedule, or manual call. Multi-agent aware. Re-loads always-resident slices, refreshes L1, archives stale state.
files.data_flow: SIG_SYNC_DRIFT or POST /kernel/sync → sync pulse → S-MMU.rebuild_l1()

files.purpose: LLM output validation. Checks responses for hallucinations, format violations, harmful content. Fires SIG_PERCEPTION_ERROR interrupt on failure.
files.data_flow: RIC post-LLM → perception.validate() → pass or SIG_PERCEPTION_ERROR

files.purpose: Pluggable LLM backends. Supports Claude (Anthropic), Gemini (Google), Kimi. Load-balances by capability. Tracks provider health. Per-agent model config.
files.data_flow: RIC → provider.provider_chat() → routes to best available LLM

files.purpose: Agent registry. Loads agent configs from DB, maps agent_id to interrupt_types and provider preferences. Supports multi-agent routing.
CognitiveState model. Snapshots L1 state (slice_ids, token_count, drift_value) to PostgreSQL for crash recovery and cross-session continuity.
Interrupt type definitions and priority constants. Defines InterruptType enum (admin_message, heartbeat, maintenance, etc.), InterruptStatus, and INTERRUPT_PRIORITIES dict.
Privacy masking. Strips PII (real names, credentials) from context before LLM injection.
Hook registry. Allows registering post-process callbacks keyed by interrupt type.

gateway.purpose: Message ingestion and pre-processing layer. Handles incoming WhatsApp/web messages before kernel routing.

files.purpose: Main gateway handler. Decides kernel vs legacy path (kernel_enabled flag). Assembles interrupt payload, submits to IVT.
LLM-based message classifiers. Detects: stop commands, multi-task instructions (plan classifier), workflow triggers, agent dispatch type. Also contains legacy needs_claude_help() for fallback path.
Builds system prompt injected into gateway LLM calls. Uses context briefing + memory slices.
Persists incoming/outgoing messages to cross_brain_messages table. Also writes to Graphiti for graph ingestion.
Handles Athena (second WhatsApp instance, :3002). Prospect routing, CRM updates, outreach state machine for WebAssist lead qualification.
Contact management integration. Looks up/creates contacts in DB based on WhatsApp sender ID.
Geo-pricing hook. Detects visitor country via api.country.is, adjusts WebAssist pricing response for location-based tiers.
Pydantic models for gateway payloads (IncomingMessage, GatewayResponse).
Gateway FastAPI router. Exposes /gateway/message and /gateway/stream endpoints consumed by WhatsApp interface.

memory_api.purpose: Central FastAPI service (:8100) — Otto's brain API. 80+ route modules covering all memory layers, task management, domain modules, and infrastructure.

core_files.purpose: Settings (pydantic-settings). PostgreSQL, OpenAI, Gemini, Kimi, Graphiti, Neo4j, WhatsApp, Stripe, SVC, AgentOS kernel flags, S-MMU L1 capacity.
Pydantic models for all API entities (tasks, memories, sessions, workflows, etc.).
OpenAI text-embedding-3-small wrapper with SVC bias-direction removal (sweep #13).
LLM chat helpers. llm_chat() and provider_chat() wrappers. Routes to Kimi/Gemini/Claude.
Assembles multi-source context briefing. Calls HyMem, episodic, procedural, graph.
SimpleMem 3-stage semantic compression (DEDUP+SUMMARIZE+RANK+TRIM, arXiv 2601.02553). No LLM calls.
G2CP structured kernel communication (arXiv 2602.13370). Writes typed graph nodes (directive, decision, task_state, context) to cross_brain_graph + Graphiti.
Memory composition utilities. Merges context layers for injection.
Secrets vault. Encrypted storage for API keys and credentials.
Web3 wallet abstraction. Interfaces to CDP AgentKit and Solana wallet.
Failure branch detection logic (standalone module, used by routes/failure_branch.py).
Workflow gate notification dispatcher. Sends WhatsApp/email alerts on gate triggers.
DAO governance helpers. Proposal creation, voting, quorum checks.
MCP (Model Context Protocol) server. Exposes Otto tools as MCP endpoints for external agent consumption.

api_routes.purpose: 80+ FastAPI router modules forming the full Otto API surface.

routes.purpose: Semantic memory store and retrieval. HyMem dual-granularity (full+summary), ARAG 3-strategy retrieval, A-MEM memory graph linking (arXiv 2502.12110), BMAM blended ranking, SVC bias removal, FadeMem decay, importance scoring. Key endpoints: remember, search, search_with_links, arag_search, hymem_briefing_facts, forget.
Episodic event logging and timeline queries. Events with salience scoring, consolidation to narratives.
Procedural memory (skill/procedure storage). Trust score tracking, outcome recording.
Memory maintenance: semantic dedup (cosine > 0.92), episodic summarization (7-day window), stale detection. run_maintenance_job() called by otto-maintenance.timer.
Working memory slots. PUT /working/memory/{slot} for fast key-value state injection.
Full maintenance suite: salience decay (FadeMem), dedup, episodic consolidation, schema health checks.
Context briefing aggregation (/briefing). Multi-source assembly: sessions + semantic + episodic + procedural + graph. Context injection (/inject) used by session hook.
Heartbeat reasoning chain persistence. WHY/DECIDED/EXPECTED per cycle. RL2F Layer 2: outcome_match tracking (matched/partial/miss). extract_lessons on misses. pre_decision_brief surfaces lessons.

Reinforcement Learning from Teacher Feedback (two layers). Layer 1: heartbeat-level critiques. Layer 2: task retry feedback chain (QA rejection → structured feedback → retry → outcome). Training pipeline support via untrained endpoint.

Just-In-Time RL (arXiv 2601.18510). Experience replay: store (state, action, reward, outcome) tuples, optimize via k-NN retrieval + advantage computation. No gradient updates. Ingest tasks as experiences.

AutoEvolve experiment tracker (karpathy/autoresearch-inspired). Hypothesis → targeted file mutation → N-cycle evaluation → keep/discard. Generation counter. Reflection versions with veto/rollback. Insights endpoint for reflection agent.
Benchmark-gated self-modification evaluation. Stores eval results, trend analysis, metacognitive gap detection.
Workflow and task auto-evaluation scoring. Rates quality/relevance/efficiency post-completion.
Failure-Branch Adaptation (STEM-inspired). Detect failure signals in task output, LLM root-cause analysis, correction generation, retest validation. History and stats.
Learned principles store. Behavioral rules extracted from RL2F misses. Trust-scored and decay-weighted.
Reasoning conclusions tracking. Stores and queries derived insights from MARS reflection.

task_execution.description: Task queue, plans, and workflow engine

routes.purpose: Full task lifecycle: create, run, complete, cancel, stop, review, QA status. Plan decomposition, LATS-style preflect, JiTRL hint injection, A2A completion signals, artifact path storage (HiClaw GAP-2), hindsight analysis. Max 5 concurrent (claude=3, gemini=1, kimi=1).

DAG task orchestration. Decomposes instructions into N tasks with dependency edges. Topology detection (parallel/sequential/hybrid). Agent auto-employment from agency-agents/. Dependency output injection. Plan finalization on completion.

Multi-agent pipeline engine. Template-based sequential step execution. Auto-eval + mutation evolution (fitness tracking). Gate system (human_approval, code_review, security_audit). Artifact path resolution. Step output interpolation. Evolution history.

kernel_api.purpose: Kernel control panel. /status, /interrupt, /process, /sync, /l1, /drift, /slices, /providers. Maps HTTP to kernel module functions.

sessions_graph.purpose: Cross-brain graph node CRUD (G2CP). Typed nodes: directive, decision, task_state, context.

communication.purpose: WhatsApp incoming message handler. Routes to kernel gateway.
Email via Zoho SMTP/IMAP. Send, inbox, reply, threads, search, status.
Agent-to-Agent messaging. Channel-scoped PostgreSQL mailbox. send, poll, peers endpoints for inter-agent coordination within plans/workflows.
Notification dispatch. WhatsApp send, scheduled notifications.
Multi-channel broadcast system (MVP). X/Twitter + Telegram + WhatsApp. Awaiting credentials.

Commerce/payments. Stripe integration, product catalog, order management.
Order lifecycle. Status tracking, fulfillment pipeline.
Investor relationship management. Pitch deck versioning, meeting notes, pipeline.
Contact book. Cross-channel identity resolution (WhatsApp JID, email, wallet).
Service registry. Tracks external services Otto integrates with.
Live system registry + weekly improvement cycle. Distinct from tasks: never done. Health monitoring, improvement history.
Athena (WebAssist outreach agent) API. Prospect management, conversation state, stage progression.
Trading signal management. Signal lifecycle, performance tracking, publisher state.

content_research.purpose: Article CMS. Content versioning, diff-based editing, publication tracking across Paragraph/X.
Content pipeline. Multi-stage creation (draft→review→publish). Version labels, workflow integration.
Research notes and paper tracking. Implementation status, action items, importance scoring.
Idea capture system. Captures fleeting thoughts from conversations via hook. Tagged, searchable.
Unified search across all Otto data. Queries semantic, episodic, tasks, articles, contacts simultaneously.
MARS dual-reflection system. Adversarial critiques, self-critique scores, MARS synthesis. Per-cycle storage.

infrastructure.purpose: Universe registry. YAML-backed project/persona registry at ~/otto/universe/. CRUD + LLM conversational edit + versioned changelog. 15 projects + 3 personas.
Backup management API. Trigger/status for VM state backups.
Security audit findings. CVE tracking, vulnerability intelligence (NVD, DeFiHackLabs, MITRE ATLAS).
Encrypted secrets vault. API key storage, retrieval with audit log.
File management. Upload, retrieval, artifact path registry.
System metrics. Task stats, RL2F accuracy, memory counts, service health.
Skill registry. Maps skill names to agent types. 20+ registered skills.
Active agent registry + agency-agents browser. Lists 139 available unemployed agents.
Workspace management. Working directory scoping for multi-project tasks.
Strategic plans store. Long-horizon planning docs, milestone tracking.
Message routing decisions log. Tracks dispatch classifier decisions for analysis.
Pending questions tracker. /ask registers questions Otto is waiting on, /open returns unresolved.
General intake handler. Catches miscellaneous input types.

calendar_social.purpose: Social media calendar. MY3YE and PiPi content scheduling, slot management.
Unified calendar system (arXiv 2026-03-27 architecture). Slots, bookings, availability.
SOS education module. Learner paths, curriculum, contribution-to-advancement system.

domain_modules_lib.purpose: Standalone Python modules implementing domain logic

modules.purpose: Koink.fun tokenomics engine. DHM decay algorithm, chain-agnostic launch logic, $KOINK Standard.
ONEON identity network. DID generation, verifiable credentials, on-chain governance, invisible web3 layer (seamless Web2 UX over Web3 rails).
SOS Systems modules. Emergency case management, learner tracking.
Crypto trading engine. Signal generation, execution, portfolio management, NLP trade parsing.
Bankr.bot HTTP client. REST integration with bankr.bot Agent API for trading.
Vulnerability intelligence database. NVD API v2, DeFiHackLabs, MITRE ATLAS ingestion.

channels.purpose: Primary Mev↔Otto communication channel. Receives messages → POSTs to Memory API /whatsapp/incoming → kernel gateway. Outbound via POST /send.
channels.data_flow: WhatsApp → service.mjs → POST /whatsapp/incoming → gateway → IVT → RIC → LLM → WhatsApp

heartbeat_agents.purpose: Claude Code sub-agents defining autonomous behavior

active_agents.purpose: Primary autonomous loop. Mission execution: review tasks, process cross-brain notes, create/launch tasks, message Mev. Budget $1.00, Sonnet. Runs hourly.
Reflection heartbeat. Memory consolidation, AutoEvolve evaluation, MARS dual-reflection, RL2F scoring, performance analysis. Budget $1.00, Sonnet. Runs at :30.
Alpha project specialized heartbeat. Crypto signal scanning, trading decisions. Runs every 2h via otto-alpha-heartbeat.timer.
Deep research agent. Multi-source retrieval (web+semantic+graph+codebase). Pipeline Step 0+3 (retrieval and storage).
Pipeline Step 1. Receives raw multi-source findings, compresses to structured intelligence. Synthesis-only, no new retrieval.
Architecture decisions, API design, integration planning, trade-off evaluation.
Writes code, builds features, implements research papers, fixes bugs.
Read-only code review. Quality, correctness, security, consistency. Does not modify code.
Diagnoses failures, traces errors, implements minimal fixes.
All MY3YE ecosystem content. Articles, manifestos, landing copy, X threads. Calm authority brand voice.
Memory consolidation, dedup, archive, merge. Called during reflection cycles.
Signal-based outbound sequences, ICP definition, WebAssist prospecting.
Viral loops, conversion funnels, acquisition channels.
Cross-platform social campaigns, community management.
Real-time engagement, thread creation, thought leadership.
Build and optimize landing pages.
Recurring security sweeps, threat intel, CVE scanning, hardening.
Evidence-based production readiness certification. Strict default NEEDS_WORK.
EVM Solidity development, gas optimization, DeFi protocols.
Vulnerability detection, formal verification, audit reports.
Feature prioritization, velocity optimization.

files.purpose: Fires on session start/resume/compaction. Creates session, fetches context briefing (/context/inject), injects identity+memory+events into Claude context.
Fires when Claude stops responding. Ends session via /sessions/{id}/end.

categories: Architecture designs (A2A, MCP, dynamic tool composition, EMRS, etc.)
Ecosystem roadmaps (Koink, ONEON, Tusita, SOS, Music, Otto AI)

mev_message_to_otto: 1. Mev sends WhatsApp → Baileys service.mjs receives
4. IVT enqueues admin_message interrupt, signals asyncio Event
7. S-MMU queries HyMem/ARAG for relevant L2 memories
8. RIC builds system prompt + LLM call (Kimi/Claude/Gemini)
9. 8 post-process hooks fire: episodic log, persist, graphiti, pending match, directive extract, reactive dispatch, drift measure, thought vault
10. Reactive dispatch may classify for plan creation or agent dispatch
task_execution: 1. Heartbeat or RIC reactive dispatch creates task (POST /tasks)
3. task_runner.sh spawns: pre-flight → budget check → claude CLI
4. Claude Code runs with specialist agent (coder/architect/etc.)
6. tasks.py: trigger QA, JiTRL ingest, A2A signal, fire task interrupt
7. qa_runner.sh: Gemini review → approve/reject → RL2F feedback
8. If plan task: task_plans.py advances DAG, injects output to dependents
9. If workflow task: workflows.py advances step, evaluates, may evolve
memory_storage: Semantic: remember() → OpenAI embed → SVC bias removal → pgvector INSERT → A-MEM link update
Episodic: events logged → salience scored → consolidated to narratives after 7 days
Procedural: created once → outcome updates trust score via exponential smoothing
Graph: graphiti_ingest() → Neo4j entity extraction → cross_brain_graph G2CP nodes
Agent memory: specialist agents write MEMORY.md + topic files to .claude/agent-memory/{type}/

learning_systems_summary.RL2F: 2-layer feedback. L1: teacher critiques per heartbeat. L2: QA rejection → structured feedback → retry outcome → training signal.
learning_systems_summary.JiTRL: Experience replay (arXiv 2601.18510). KNN similarity → advantage computation → ranked action hints at task creation.
learning_systems_summary.AutoEvolve: karpathy/autoresearch-inspired. Hypothesis → file mutation → N-cycle eval → keep/discard. Currently Gen 3.
learning_systems_summary.MARS: Multi-Adversarial Reflection System. Initial conclusions → adversarial critic → synthesis. Per reflection cycle.
learning_systems_summary.HyMem: Dual-granularity retrieval. Full content + pre-computed summaries. Reduces retrieval token cost.
learning_systems_summary.A-MEM: Memory graph (arXiv 2502.12110). New memories auto-link to related old ones. Zettelkasten-style.
learning_systems_summary.BMAM: Blended ranking. Combines vector similarity + recency + importance + goal alignment.
learning_systems_summary.A-RAG: 3-strategy retrieval. Semantic + keyword + graph. Merges and re-ranks results.
learning_systems_summary.SVC: Singular Value Calibration. Removes top-3 bias directions from query embeddings.
learning_systems_summary.Reasoning Chain: WHY→DECIDED→EXPECTED→ACTUAL per heartbeat. Outcome matching drives RL2F Layer 2 lesson extraction.

papers: arXiv 2602.20934v1 — AgentOS cognitive OS (kernel, IVT, S-MMU, drift, sync)
VISTA hypothesis loop (math reasoning, adapted for task failure)
Constraint injection (PG-CoT gates at heartbeat checkpoints)

identified_gaps: STEM: Caller Profiler not implemented (5-8 dim tracker for Mev preferences)
STEM: Dynamic Tool Composition not implemented
STEM: Self-Adaptation (RL2F) cross-session only, not within-session
S-MMU: similarity_threshold=0.7 not applied to near-miss injection (P5 deferred)
RL2F: idle_cycle tagging missing — inflates accuracy metrics during idle periods
VISTA: hypothesis loop structured categorization not fully implemented
HiClaw GAP-3: heartbeat sometimes bypasses plan system for multi-step work
Context Rot: S-MMU inject ordering not always at START
AutoEvolve Gen 3: active workload validation needed (current improvement possibly inflated by idle)
p1_actions: VISTA structured failure categorization + prompt injection into retry
S-MMU near-miss threshold 0.7 for L2 injection
